properties.description: From the beginning of November to the end of March, the Breakfast Club is open every Monday, 9am -12pm. Everyone is welcome. We offer a warm welcome, good company and free tea, coffee, cereals, toast and bacon rolls. We have a free community book and DVD exchange and can sign post to other local groups and services.
properties.title: Alburgh Breakfast Club

properties.description: Beechwood Park is open Monday - Friday offering a hot drink and coffee for £1 for over 65s in the local community. Free parking available on site.
properties.title: Brio Retirement Living Beechwood Park

properties.address: Chipping Norton Library, Chipping Norton, Oxfordshire OX7 5NP
properties.description: SPACE OPENING ON 3rd November 2023** We offer a dedicated Warm Space within the library Friday afternoons 1-5pm where you can help yourself to free tea/ coffee. Please feel free to visit us at other times when we are open for free wifi, computer access and of course lots of books! You don't need to be a member to drop in.
properties.title: Chipping Norton Library

properties.address: Draycott Mission, Draycott, Moreton in Marsh GGL56 9LF
properties.title: Draycott Mission

properties.description: Our accessible space is open for all ages and is free, safe and warm. We offer a warm welcome with lots of chat, friendship, hot drinks, light lunches and lots of cake. We have activities such as jigsaws, board games, crafts, speakers, quizzes, exercise, singing.
properties.title: Ducklington Warm Welcome Space

properties.address: Cherington Stourton & Sutton Under Brailes Village Hall, Warwickshire CV36 5HG
properties.description: A free social afternoon once a fortnight. Free refreshments and a lovely atmosphere.

properties.title: Hook Norton Library

properties.description: A village pub, focussed on meeting the needs of the local community. Independently run, friendly and welcoming.
properties.title: Horse and Groom Inn

properties.description: Friendship café, includes crafting and seated exercise. Meets weekly on a Wednesday between 10-2. Donation £1 per session to include tea and cake, clients are welcome to bring their own lunch if they want to stay for full session.
properties.title: Jameson's Court Friendship Cafe

properties.description: Moreton-in-Marsh Library is located on Stow Road and has a level entrance. Libraries are traditionally a place where people can go without judgement or cost and we offer a range of core services all year round. What we are offering: •Warm, dry buildings with spaces to sit and keep warm •Free access to Wi-Fi and free computer access with a Library membership •Places to charge your devices •Signposting to advice and support •Regular groups, activities and events ranging from jigsaw puzzles to social sessions Library membership is free! Join online or at your local library. Explore more at gloslibraries.uk Discover services, catch up on news, and browse events for all ages.
properties.title: Moreton-in-Marsh Library

properties.address: The Parish Rooms, Church Street, Chipping Norton OX7 5NT
properties.description: Our Weekly Tuesday Cafe is for everyone and also has a help desk, term time only, 1-2.30pm Our Weekly Wednesday session only caters for Carers and Toddlers, term time only, 9.15-11.30am On second Friday of the month we welcome everyone to Come to Tea, 3-4.30pm
properties.title: St Mary's Church & The Branch Trust
